mapper.select: SELECT wc.id, wc.tenant_code, t.tenant_name, wc.app_id, wc.mch_id, wc.sort, wc.create_time, wc.create_by, wc.update_time, wc.update_by, wc.remark, wc.version FROM pay_wxpay_config wc INNER JOIN auth_tenant t ON t.tenant_code = wc.tenant_code WHERE wc.deleted = 0 AND t.deleted = 0 AND wc.tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND wc.app_id = #{appId} AND wc.mch_id = #{mchId} ORDER BY wc.id DESC
